newsEvents.content: Early monsoon expected in Odisha starting next week. Prepare drainage systems and cover sensitive crops.

newsEvents.title: PM-KISAN Payment Approved
newsEvents.content: Latest installment of PM-KISAN has been processed. Check your account for credit within 24 hours.

newsEvents.title: Armyworm Outbreak Warning
newsEvents.content: Armyworm detected in neighboring districts. Farmers advised to monitor fields and use recommended pesticides.

newsEvents.title: Soil Health Card Distribution
newsEvents.content: Free soil testing and health card distribution drive starting next month in Kendrapara.

alerts.title: paddy Price Alert

alerts.recommendedAction: Monitor prices closely; consider selling soon

activeSchemes.name: PM-KISAN
activeSchemes.description: Direct income support scheme providing cash transfers to all landholding farmers.
benefits: ₹2000 per acre per season (₹6000 per year)
No hidden charges or documentation hassle

activeSchemes.name: eNAM
activeSchemes.description: Digital platform for agricultural trade providing better price discovery and reduced middlemen.

activeSchemes.name: Soil Health Card
activeSchemes.description: Free soil testing and recommendations for optimal nutrient management.
benefits: Reduced input costs through optimized usage

activeSchemes.name: Kisan Credit Card
activeSchemes.description: Flexible short-term credit facility for agricultural operations
benefits: Flexible credit up to 4x times deposit

immediateActions.title: Market Timing Strategy
immediateActions.description: Market prices for paddy are declining
steps: Check if early harvesting is possible
Look for alternative markets through eNAM
Consider value addition (processing) if feasible
Wait for stabilization if you can afford to store

mediumTermActions.title: Soil Health Check
mediumTermActions.description: Get your soil tested and receive personalized recommendations
mediumTermActions.expectedBenefit: Optimize fertilizer use and improve crop yield
steps: Visit nearest soil testing lab
Provide soil samples from different parts of field
Get soil health card with recommendations
Follow nutrient recommendations for this season

mediumTermActions.title: Plan Credit for Next Season
mediumTermActions.description: Be prepared for next planting season
steps: Visit your bank branch
Apply for Kisan Credit Card
Get credit limit up to 4x your deposit
Use for seeds, fertilizers, equipment rental

Here's your personalized farm advisory:

Market: paddy prices are ₹3175.420486633938/quintal (down trend).

For more details, check your dashboard.

Stay safe and prosper! 🌾

data.consolidatedInsight:
PERSONALIZED FARM ANALYSIS

⚠️ CRITICAL ALERTS:
• Monsoon Early Arrival Alert: Early monsoon expected in Odisha starting next week. Prepare drainage systems and cover sensitive crops.
• Armyworm Outbreak Warning: Armyworm detected in neighboring districts. Farmers advised to monitor fields and use recommended pesticides.

📊 RISK ASSESSMENT FOR PADDY:
• Overall Risk Score: 21/100
• Top Risk Factor: weather (45%)
• Recommendation: Current risk levels are manageable. Continue regular monitoring and practice preventive measures.

✅ RECOMMENDED ACTIONS:
• Market Timing Strategy (within-week)
• Soil Health Check (within-month)
• Plan Credit for Next Season (within-month)
